meta.description: Web search fallback index for the Parul University Smart Campus Assistant. Used ONLY when internal data files (buildings, departments, faculty, services, policies, schedules) cannot answer the query. The agent must first exhaust local data before consulting this file. Each source has intent_keywords, a type, and a fetch_strategy so the agent knows exactly how to retrieve and use the data.
meta.usage_rule: Check local JSON files first. If confidence < 0.6 or data not found locally, match the user query against intent_keywords in this file, select the best source, fetch the URL, extract the answer, and cite the source.

sources.label: About Parul University
sources.description: Official overview of Parul University including history, founding year, mission, vision, leadership, campus overview, and institutional profile.

sources.label: Research & Development
sources.description: Information about research activities, innovation centres, patents, funded projects, publications, and academic research initiatives at Parul University.

fetch_strategy.extract: research highlights, stats, and project listings

sources.label: Awards, Rankings & Accreditations
sources.description: Details about university rankings, awards, recognitions, ratings, accreditations including NAAC, NIRF, and other institutional achievements.

fetch_strategy.extract: awards list, rankings table, accreditation details

sources.label: Training & Placement Cell
sources.description: Information about campus placements including companies visiting the university, campus recruitment drives, placement statistics, internship programs, and student placement records.

fetch_strategy.extract: company names, placement stats, package details

sources.label: Life at Parul University
sources.description: Details about campus life, student activities, clubs, cultural festivals, sports events, extracurricular programs, and student engagement opportunities.

fetch_strategy.extract: clubs list, events, student activity descriptions

sources.label: IQAC — Internal Quality Assurance Cell
sources.description: Information about the Internal Quality Assurance Cell including academic quality standards, institutional governance, audits, compliance mechanisms, and NAAC-related information.

fetch_strategy.extract: IQAC committee details, reports, quality initiatives

sources.label: Student Services
sources.description: Details about student support services including hostel facilities, counselling, scholarships, welfare programs, grievance redressal, and student assistance systems.

fetch_strategy.extract: services list, contact details, support programs

sources.label: Contact & Connect
sources.description: Official contact details of Parul University including address, phone numbers, email contacts, enquiry forms, and communication channels.

fetch_strategy.extract: address, phone numbers, email IDs, map embed

sources.label: Admissions Overview (Online Portal)
sources.description: Overview of online admissions including available programs, admission announcements, and application-related updates.

sources.label: How to Apply
sources.description: Step-by-step admission process including eligibility criteria, required documents, application procedure, and admission guidelines.

fetch_strategy.extract: step-by-step process, eligibility criteria, document list

sources.label: Admissions Application Portal
sources.description: Official online application portal where students submit admission forms and track application status.

fetch_strategy.note: Do not scrape — just provide the URL directly to the user

sources.label: All Programs & Courses
sources.description: Comprehensive list of all undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral programs offered at Parul University across all faculties.

fetch_strategy.extract: full program list with faculty groupings

sources.label: Careers & Job Vacancies at Parul University
sources.description: Information about job vacancies at Parul University including faculty recruitment, staff openings, administrative positions, and employment opportunities within the university.

fetch_strategy.extract: open positions, designation, department, application link

sources.label: Privacy Policy
sources.description: Official privacy policy explaining how Parul University handles user data, data protection practices, and website privacy guidelines.

sources.label: Terms of Use
sources.description: Terms and conditions governing the use of Parul University website and online services.

sources.label: Wikipedia — Parul University
sources.description: Encyclopedic third-party overview of Parul University including public history, academic structure, notable facts, and general information. Use as a fallback for general public knowledge queries.

fetch_strategy.note: Use only for general/public knowledge queries. Do not use for live data like placements, events, or timings.

sources.label: Shiksha Profile — Student Reviews & Ratings
sources.description: External educational profile including student reviews, ratings, program comparisons, and admission insights from a third-party aggregator.

fetch_strategy.extract: overall rating, top reviews, pros and cons
fetch_strategy.note: Use only when student asks for reviews or external opinions. Always clarify this is from a third-party source.

routing_rules.description: Rules the agent follows to decide when and how to use web sources.

rules.name: Local First
rules.description: Always check local JSON files first — buildings.json, departments.json, faculty.json, services.json, schedules.json, policies.json, facilities.json, paths.json. Only fall back to web sources if local data does not contain a confident answer.

rules.name: Keyword Match
rules.description: Match the user query against intent_keywords in each source. Select the source with the highest keyword overlap. If multiple sources match, prefer the one with lower priority number (1 = highest priority).

rules.name: Dynamic vs Static
rules.description: For sources with type 'dynamic' (placements, admissions, careers, life_at_pu), always fetch fresh data — do not rely on cached or assumed information. For type 'informational', cached data is acceptable.

rules.name: Portal URLs
rules.description: For sources with fetch_strategy.method = 'redirect_url', do NOT attempt to scrape. Simply return the URL to the user with a brief description.

rules.name: External Source Disclosure
rules.description: When using sources with type 'external' (Wikipedia, Shiksha), always inform the user that the information is from a third-party source and may not represent the official university position.

rules.name: Legal Source Handling
rules.description: For type 'legal' sources (privacy policy, terms of use), retrieve and summarise — do not reproduce the full text. Always link to the original URL.

rules.name: Cache Respect
rules.description: Respect cache_hours per source. Do not re-fetch a source if it was fetched within the cache window and the data is still valid. For cache_hours = 0, always fetch fresh.

rules.name: Fallback Message
rules.description: If no local data and no web source matches the query, respond: 'I could not find this information in my current knowledge base. Please contact the relevant university office directly or visit paruluniversity.ac.in for the most accurate information.'

agent_prompt_hint: You are the Parul University Smart Campus Assistant. You have access to local JSON knowledge files and this web source index as a fallback. When a user asks a question: (1) Check local files first. (2) If not found locally, look up the best matching source in this file using intent_keywords. (3) Fetch the URL using the fetch_strategy. (4) Extract the relevant answer. (5) Always cite the source URL in your response. (6) For dynamic sources, mention that information may change and the user should verify from the official site.
